title: anthropics/financial-services
friendlyTitle: Anthropic shared finance-focused Claude agent examples
summary: Anthropic’s financial-services repository packages Claude agents, skills, slash commands, MCP data connectors, and deployment tooling for workflows across investment banking, equity research, private equity, wealth management, fund administration, and finance operations.
friendlySummary: This repo contains Claude agent templates and tools for finance workflows like research, memos, reconciliations, and analysis.
whyItMatters: Financial-services teams can study the repo as a reference design for domain-specific agents that draft analyst work product while preserving human review. It is also useful for developers building regulated agent workflows with plugins, skills, and managed-agent templates.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Finance and enterprise teams can use it as a model for building AI helpers that draft work but still require human review.
